channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Americans celebrate Juneteenth as Obama’s presidential center opens to the public
item.description: As people gather at events across the U.S. to celebrate Juneteenth, former President Barack Obama’s presidential center will open its doors to the public for the first time.

item.title: With a sledgehammer and a shovel, volunteers raced to save passengers in Texas plane crash
Trump administration can replace Washington slavery exhibit in Philadelphia, appeals court says
